global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：Xcode 27 原生集成谷歌 Gemini，三大编程 AI 智能体齐聚苹果开发平台；Google DeepMind releases DiffusionGemma, a model that runs local AI 4x faster；Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment。
